Package org.eventb.internal.core.pm

    Returns flags that describe how an user support has changed.

    Getting the list of information about the changes in user support (including the output of the applied tactics, messages about the last action in the user support, etc.)

    Returns the kind of this delta - one of ADDED, REMOVED, or CHANGED.

      the kind of this delta

    • setKind

      public void setKind(int type)
      Sets the kind of this delta - one of ADDED, REMOVED, or CHANGED.

      Parameters:
      type - the kind to be set

    • getFlags

      public int getFlags()
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupportDelta
      Returns flags that describe how an user support has changed. Such flags should be tested using the & operand. For example: 
       if ((delta.getFlags() & IUserSupportDelta.F_CURRENT) != 0) {
        // the delta indicates the current proof obligation has changed
 }
      Specified by:
      getFlags in interface IUserSupportDelta
      Returns:
      flags that describe how an user support has changed

    • setFlags

      public void setFlags(int flags)
      Sets the changes flags to describe how an user support has changed.

      Parameters:
      flags - that describe how an user support has changed
